category_sources: source_facts.description says code generation tool for control and status registers; official rggen/rggen README says RgGen generates CSR-related RTL, UVM, C headers, and Markdown.
display_name_sources: Official rggen/rggen README title is RgGen.
docs_sources: Official rggen/rggen README directs usage and plugin documentation to Wiki documents and also provides README usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rggen/rggen; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe CSR code generation for ASIC/IP/FPGA/RTL workflows and multiple hardware output formats.
